tasks.label: Enable Debug Delay for Tests
args: Set-Content -Path '${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\debug_delay_enabled.flag' -Value '7'; Write-Host 'Debug delay ENABLED - 7 seconds' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Now run any test in CMake Test Explorer - it will wait 10 seconds for debugger' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host 'Use Disable Debug Delay task to turn off' -ForegroundColor Gray

tasks.label: Enable Debug Delay for Tests (macOS)
args: echo 7 > ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/debug_delay_enabled.flag && echo 'Debug delay ENABLED - 7 seconds' && echo 'Now run any test in CMake Test Explorer - it will wait 10 seconds for debugger' && echo 'Use Disable Debug Delay task to turn off'

tasks.label: Disable Debug Delay for Tests (macOS)
args: rm -f ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/debug_delay_enabled.flag && echo 'Debug delay DISABLED' && echo 'Tests will now run normally without delay'

tasks.label: Clean Build Directory
args: if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}\out') { Remove-Item '${workspaceFolder}\out' -Recurse -Force; Write-Host 'Build directory cleaned successfully' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'No build directory to clean' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

tasks.label: Disable Debug Delay for Tests
args: Remove-Item '${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\debug_delay_enabled.flag' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Debug delay DISABLED' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Tests will now run normally without delay' -ForegroundColor Yellow
